narrative:
West Chester Twp 24 (precinct in Butler County) has 876 registered voters, with 55.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.8%, a clear Republican lean of 8.9 percentage points.
